results.rendered_html:
dhvaṃsana (von dhvaṃs)
1〉 adj.
a〉 zu Fall bringend, vernichtend: mahendramiva śatrūṇāṃ dhvaṃsanaṃ śaravṛṣṭibhiḥ  MBH. 5,5316 . kaṃsa˚  GĪT. 5,20 . dakṣādhvara˚ Bein. Śivaʼs  PRAB. 33,15 .
— b〉 spritzend, als Erkl. von dhvasani  NIR. 2,9 .
— 2〉 n. das zu-Grunde-Richten, Vernichten: āśrama˚  R. 6,38,21 . akhilajagadbandha˚  BHĀG. P. 5,1,23 .

dhvaṃsana a. [dhvaṃs-ṇic lyu]
1 Destroying, ruining.
2 Scattering, dispersing.
3 Sprinkling, covering.
— naṃ
1 Perishing, dying.
2 Loss, destruction.
3 Falling.
4 Going.
